creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
note that redports is considered 100% worthless right now.  You need be submitting poudriere logs if you can.  (or lessly portlint ; make check-plist ; make stage-qa output)

I see a couple issues with the shar too.

1) you are using the obsolete @dirrm* lines
2) your do-install commands are masked with "@", that's not allowed except on mkdir commands
